candidate_definition_hints.text: A secure fs backend for electron apps

This is an i18next library designed to work with [secure-electron-template](https://github.com/reZach/secure-electron-template). The library is a rough copy of [i18next-node-fs-backend](https://github.com/i18next/i18next-node-fs-backend) but using IPC (inter-process-communicatio…
